fields.name: SVOS
fields.description: System Stop mode voltage scaling selection.

fields.name: PVDE
fields.description: Programmable voltage detector enable

fields.name: PLS
fields.description: Programmable voltage detector level selection These bits select the voltage threshold detected by the PVD. Note: Refer to Section Electrical characteristics of the product datasheet for more details.

fields.name: DBP
fields.description: Disable backup domain write protection In reset state, the RCC_BDCR register, the RTC registers (including the backup registers), BREN and MOEN bits in the PWR_CSR1 register, are protected against parasitic write access. This bit must be set to enable write access to these registers.

fields.name: FLPS
fields.description: Flash low-power mode in Stop mode This bit allows to obtain the best trade-off between low-power consumption and restart time when exiting from Stop mode. When it is set, the Flash memory enters low-power mode when device is in Stop mode. consumption).

fields.name: RLPSN
fields.description: RAM low power mode disable in STOP. When set the RAMs will not enter to low power mode when the system enters to STOP.

fields.name: BOOSTE
fields.description: analog switch VBoost control This bit enables the booster to guarantee the analog switch AC performance when the VDD supply voltage is below 2.7 V (reduction of the total harmonic distortion to have the same switch performance over the full supply voltage range) The VDD supply voltage can be monitored through the PVD and the PLS bits.

fields.name: AVDREADY
fields.description: analog voltage ready This bit is only used when the analog switch boost needs to be enabled (see BOOSTE bit). It must be set by software when the expected VDDA analog supply level is available. The correct analog supply level is indicated by the AVDO bit (PWR_CSR1 register) after setting the AVDEN bit and selecting the supply level to be monitored (ALS bits).

fields.name: AVDEN
fields.description: Peripheral voltage monitor on VDDA enable

fields.name: ALS
fields.description: Analog voltage detector level selection These bits select the voltage threshold detected by the AVD. Note: Refer to Section Electrical characteristics of the product datasheet for more details.

fields.name: ACTVOS
fields.description: VOS currently applied for V<sub>CORE</sub> voltage scaling selection. These bit reflect the last VOS value applied to the PMU.

fields.name: ACTVOSRDY
fields.description: Voltage levels ready bit for currently used ACTVOS and SDHILEVEL This bit is set to 1 by hardware when the voltage regulator and the SMPS step-down converter are both disabled and Bypass mode is selected in PWR control register 2 (PWR_CSR2).

fields.name: PVDO
fields.description: Programmable voltage detect output This bit is set and cleared by hardware. It is valid only if the PVD has been enabled by the PVDE bit. PLS[2:0] bits. bits. Note: Since the PVD is disabled in Standby mode, this bit is equal to 0 after Standby or reset until the PVDE bit is set.

fields.name: AVDO
fields.description: Analog voltage detector output on VDDA This bit is set and cleared by hardware. It is valid only if AVD on VDDA is enabled by the AVDEN bit. Note: Since the AVD is disabled in Standby mode, this bit is equal to 0 after Standby or reset until the AVDEN bit is set

fields.name: BREN
fields.description: Backup regulator enable When set, the backup regulator (used to maintain the backup RAM content in Standby and V<sub>BAT</sub> modes) is enabled. If BREN is reset, the backup regulator is switched off. The backup RAM can still be used in Run and Stop modes. However, its content will be lost in Standby and V<sub>BAT</sub> modes. If BREN is set, the application must wait till the backup regulator ready flag (BRRDY) is set to indicate that the data written into the SRAM will be maintained in Standby and V<sub>BAT</sub> modes.

fields.name: MONEN
fields.description: V<sub>BAT</sub> and temperature monitoring enable When set, the V<sub>BAT</sub> supply and temperature monitoring is enabled. Note: V<sub>BAT</sub> and temperature monitoring are only available when the backup regulator is enabled (BREN bit set to 1).

fields.name: BRRDY
fields.description: Backup regulator ready This bit is set by hardware to indicate that the backup regulator is ready.

fields.name: VBATL
fields.description: V<sub>BAT</sub> level monitoring versus low threshold

fields.name: VBATH
fields.description: V<sub>BAT</sub> level monitoring versus high threshold

fields.name: TEMPL
fields.description: Temperature level monitoring versus low threshold

fields.name: TEMPH
fields.description: Temperature level monitoring versus high threshold

fields.name: BYPASS
fields.description: Power management unit bypass Note: Illegal combinations of SDHILEVEL, SMPSEXTHP, SDEN, LDOEN and BYPASS are described in Table 41.

fields.name: LDOEN
fields.description: Low drop-out regulator enable Note: Illegal combinations of SDHILEVEL, SMPSEXTHP, SDEN, LDOEN and BYPASS are described in Table 41.

fields.name: SDEN
fields.description: SMPS step-down converter enable Note: Illegal combinations of SDHILEVEL, SMPSEXTHP, SDEN, LDOEN and BYPASS are described in Table 41.

fields.name: SMPSEXTHP
fields.description: SMPS external power delivery selection Note: Illegal combinations of SDHILEVEL, SMPSEXTHP, SDEN, LDOEN and BYPASS are described in Table 41.

fields.name: SDHILEVEL
fields.description: SMPS step-down converter voltage output for LDO or external supply This bit is used when both the LDO and SMPS step-down converter are enabled with SDEN and LDOEN enabled or when SMPSEXTHP is enabled. In this case SDHILEVEL has to be set to 1 to confirm the regulator settings

fields.name: VBE
fields.description: VBAT charging enable

fields.name: VBRS
fields.description: VBAT charging resistor selection

fields.name: XSPICAP1
fields.description: XSPI port 1 capacitor control bits see the product datasheet for more details

fields.name: XSPICAP2
fields.description: XSPI port 2 capacitor control bits see the product datasheet for more details

fields.name: EN_XSPIM1
fields.description: EN_XSPIM1: this bit allow the SW to enable the XSPI interface. The XSPIM_P1 supply must be stable prior to setting this bit.

fields.name: EN_XSPIM2
fields.description: EN_XSPIM2: this bit allows the SW to enable the XSPI interface, when available. The XSPIM_P2 supply must be stable prior to setting this bit. It should also be set when FMC is used.

fields.name: SDEXTRDY
fields.description: SMPS step-down converter external supply ready This bit is set by hardware to indicate that the external supply from the SMPS step-down converter is ready.

fields.name: USB33DEN
fields.description: VDD33_USB voltage level detector enable

fields.name: USBREGEN
fields.description: USB regulator enable.

fields.name: USB33RDY
fields.description: USB supply ready.

fields.name: USBHSREGEN
fields.description: USB HS regulator enable.

fields.name: PDDS
fields.description: Power Down Deepsleep. This bit allows CPU to define the Deepsleep mode

fields.name: CSSF
fields.description: Clear Standby and Stop flags (always read as 0) This bit is cleared to 0 by hardware.

fields.name: STOPF
fields.description: STOP flag This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by any reset or by setting the CPU CSSF bit.

fields.name: SBF
fields.description: System Standby flag This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a POR (Power-on Reset) or by setting the CPU CSSF bit

fields.name: VOS
fields.description: Voltage scaling selection according to performance These bits control the V<sub>CORE</sub> voltage level and allow to obtains the best trade-off between power consumption and performance: When increasing the performance, the voltage scaling must be changed before increasing the system frequency. When decreasing performance, the system frequency must first be decreased before changing the voltage scaling. Note: Refer to Section Electrical characteristics of the product datasheet for more details.

fields.name: VOSRDY
fields.description: VOS Ready bit

fields.name: WKUPC1
fields.description: Clear Wakeup pin flag for WKUP1 These bits are always read as 0.

fields.name: WKUPC2
fields.description: Clear Wakeup pin flag for WKUP2 These bits are always read as 0.

fields.name: WKUPC3
fields.description: Clear Wakeup pin flag for WKUP3 These bits are always read as 0.

fields.name: WKUPC4
fields.description: Clear Wakeup pin flag for WKUP4 These bits are always read as 0.

fields.name: WKUPF1
fields.description: Wakeup pin WKUP1 flag. This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a Reset pin or by setting the WKUPC1 bit in the PWR wakeup clear register (PWR_WKUPCR).

fields.name: WKUPF2
fields.description: Wakeup pin WKUP2 flag. This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a Reset pin or by setting the WKUPC2 bit in the PWR wakeup clear register (PWR_WKUPCR).

fields.name: WKUPF3
fields.description: Wakeup pin WKUP3 flag. This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a Reset pin or by setting the WKUPC3 bit in the PWR wakeup clear register (PWR_WKUPCR).

fields.name: WKUPF4
fields.description: Wakeup pin WKUP4 flag. This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a Reset pin or by setting the WKUPC4 bit in the PWR wakeup clear register (PWR_WKUPCR).

registers.name: WKUPEPR
registers.description: PWR wakeup enable and polarity register

fields.name: WKUPEN1
fields.description: Enable Wakeup Pin WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) Each bit is set and cleared by software. Note: An additional wakeup event is detected if WKUPn+1 pin is enabled (by setting the WKUPENn bit) when WKUPn pin level is already high when WKUPPn+1 selects rising edge, or low when WKUPPn selects falling edge.

fields.name: WKUPEN2
fields.description: Enable Wakeup Pin WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) Each bit is set and cleared by software. Note: An additional wakeup event is detected if WKUPn+1 pin is enabled (by setting the WKUPENn bit) when WKUPn pin level is already high when WKUPPn+1 selects rising edge, or low when WKUPPn selects falling edge.

fields.name: WKUPEN3
fields.description: Enable Wakeup Pin WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) Each bit is set and cleared by software. Note: An additional wakeup event is detected if WKUPn+1 pin is enabled (by setting the WKUPENn bit) when WKUPn pin level is already high when WKUPPn+1 selects rising edge, or low when WKUPPn selects falling edge.

fields.name: WKUPEN4
fields.description: Enable Wakeup Pin WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) Each bit is set and cleared by software. Note: An additional wakeup event is detected if WKUPn+1 pin is enabled (by setting the WKUPENn bit) when WKUPn pin level is already high when WKUPPn+1 selects rising edge, or low when WKUPPn selects falling edge.

fields.name: WKUPP1
fields.description: Wakeup pin polarity bit for WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) These bits define the polarity used for event detection on WKUPn external wakeup pin.

fields.name: WKUPP2
fields.description: Wakeup pin polarity bit for WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) These bits define the polarity used for event detection on WKUPn external wakeup pin.

fields.name: WKUPP3
fields.description: Wakeup pin polarity bit for WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) These bits define the polarity used for event detection on WKUPn external wakeup pin.

fields.name: WKUPP4
fields.description: Wakeup pin polarity bit for WKUPn, (n = 4, 3, 2, 1) These bits define the polarity used for event detection on WKUPn external wakeup pin.

fields.name: WKUPPUPD1
fields.description: Wakeup pin pull configuration for WKUPn, These bits define the I/O pad pull configuration used when WKUPENn = 1. The associated GPIO port pull configuration must be set to the same value or to 00. The Wakeup pin pull configuration is kept in Standby mode.

fields.name: WKUPPUPD2
fields.description: Wakeup pin pull configuration for WKUPn, These bits define the I/O pad pull configuration used when WKUPENn = 1. The associated GPIO port pull configuration must be set to the same value or to 00. The Wakeup pin pull configuration is kept in Standby mode.

fields.name: WKUPPUPD3
fields.description: Wakeup pin pull configuration for WKUPn, These bits define the I/O pad pull configuration used when WKUPENn = 1. The associated GPIO port pull configuration must be set to the same value or to 00. The Wakeup pin pull configuration is kept in Standby mode.

fields.name: WKUPPUPD4
fields.description: Wakeup pin pull configuration for WKUPn, These bits define the I/O pad pull configuration used when WKUPENn = 1. The associated GPIO port pull configuration must be set to the same value or to 00. The Wakeup pin pull configuration is kept in Standby mode.

registers.name: UCPDR
registers.description: PWR USB Type-C and Power Delivery register

fields.name: UCPD_DBDIS
fields.description: UCPD dead battery disable

fields.name: UCPD_STBY
fields.description: UCPD Standby mode When set, this bit is used to memorize the UCPD configuration in Standby mode. This bit must be written to 1 just before entering Standby mode when using UCPD. It must be written to 0 after exiting the Standby mode and before writing any UCPD registers.

fields.name: APC
fields.description: Apply pull-up and pull-down configuration When this bit is set, the I/O pull-up and pull-down configurations defined in PO5_PUPD, PN7_PUPD bits and PUCRx, PDCRx registers are applied in Standby mode even after wakeup until APC bit is reset to 0. When this bit is cleared, the I/O pull-up or pull-down configurations defined in PO5_PUPD, PN7_PUPD bits and PUCRx and PDCRx registers are not applied in Standby mode and IO becomes Hi-Z.

fields.name: PN7_PUPD
fields.description: Port N bit 7 pull-up/down configuration When this bit is set, a weak pull-up or pull-down resistor is applied on PN7 following inverse logic applied on PN6. If the PUN6 bit in PWR_PUCRN register is set and APC bit is set the week pull-down is applied on PN7. If the PDN6 bit in PWR_PDCRN register is set and APC bit is set the week pull-up is applied on PN7.

fields.name: PO5_PUPD
fields.description: Port O bit 5 pull-up/down configuration When this bit is set, a weak pull-up or pull down resistor is applied on PO5 following inverse logic applied on PO4. If the PUO4 bit in PWR_PUCRO register is set and APC bit is set the week pull-down is applied on PO5. If the PDO4 bit in PWR_PDCRO register is set and APC bit is set the week pull-up is applied on PO5..

fields.name: I3CPB6_PU
fields.description: Port PB6 I3C pull-up bit When I3C is used on PB6, when set, this bit activates the pull-up on I3C1_SCL (PB6) in standby mode.

fields.name: I3CPB7_PU
fields.description: Port PB7 I3C pull-up bit When I3C is used on PB7, when set, this bit activates the pull-up on I3C1_SDA (PB7) in standby mode.

fields.name: I3CPB8_PU
fields.description: Port PB8 I3C pull-up bit When I3C is used on PB8, when set, this bit activates the pull-up on I3C1_SCL (PB8) in standby mode.

fields.name: I3CPB9_PU
fields.description: Port PB9 I3C pull-up bit When I3C is used on PB9, when set, this bit activates the pull-up on I3C1_SDA (PB9) in standby mode.

registers.name: PUCRN
registers.description: PWR port N pull-up control register

fields.name: PUN1
fields.description: Port N pull-up bit 1 When set, each bit activates the pull-up on PN1 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PD1 bit is also set.

fields.name: PUN6
fields.description: Port N pull-up bit 6 When set activates the pull-up on PN6 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PDN6 bit is also set.

fields.name: PUN12
fields.description: Port N pull-up bit 12 When set, each bit activates the pull-up on PN12 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PD12 bit is also set.

registers.name: PDCRN
registers.description: PWR port N pull-down control register

fields.name: PDN0
fields.description: Port N pull-down bit 0 When set activates the pull-down on PN0 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDN1
fields.description: Port N pull-down bit 1 When set activates the pull-down on PN1 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDN2N5
fields.description: Port N PN2 to PN5 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resistors are activated on PN2 to PN5 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDN6
fields.description: Port N pull-down bit 6 When set activates the pull-down on PN6 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDN8N11
fields.description: Port N - PN8 to PN11 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resistors are activated on PN8 to PN11 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDN12
fields.description: Port N pull-down bit 12 When set activates the pull-down on PN12 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

registers.name: PUCRO
registers.description: PWR port O pull-up control register

fields.name: PUO0
fields.description: (n = 1 to 0) Port O pull-up bits When set, each bit activates the pull-up on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding bits in PWR_PDCRO is also set.

fields.name: PUO1
fields.description: (n = 1 to 0) Port O pull-up bits When set, each bit activates the pull-up on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding bits in PWR_PDCRO is also set.

fields.name: PUO4
fields.description: Port O pull-up bit 4 When set activates the pull-up on PO4 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR. The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding bits PDO4 in PWR_PDCRO is also set.

registers.name: PDCRO
registers.description: PWR port O pull-down control register

fields.name: PDO0
fields.description: Port O pull-down bit y When set, each bit activates the pull-down on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDO1
fields.description: Port O pull-down bit y When set, each bit activates the pull-down on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDO2
fields.description: Port O pull-down bit y When set, each bit activates the pull-down on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDO3
fields.description: Port O pull-down bit y When set, each bit activates the pull-down on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDO4
fields.description: Port O pull-down bit y When set, each bit activates the pull-down on POy when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

registers.name: PDCRP
registers.description: PWR port P pull-down control register

fields.name: PDP0P3
fields.description: Port P0-P3 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resistors are activated on P0 to P3 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDP4P7
fields.description: Port P4-P7 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resitors are activated on P4 to P7 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDP8P11
fields.description: Port P8-P11 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resistors are activated on P8 to P11 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: PDP12P15
fields.description: Port P12-P15 pull-down activation When set, four pull-down resistors are activated on P8 to P11 when the APC bit is set in PWR_APCR.

fields.name: UNLOCKED
fields.description: Debug Register Unlocked.

fields.name: SDFPWMEN
fields.description: Step down converter force PWM mode

fields.name: SYNC_ADC
fields.description: (Non-User bit)
